creator: tomh971@yahoo.com
text:
firmware error (ACPI) Could not resolve symbol [\_GPE._L07.RS*F] AE_NOT_FOUND

Trying to do a basic install and I keep getting this ACPI error.  System is a Toshiba Satelite L505D-LS5019 with 4 gig ram, 250 gig SSD, near as I can find, it has the last released BIOS on it.  Your sibling OS's install just fine (OpenBSD and NetBSD respectively)  I've looked for about 2 weeks trying to find some sort of resolution and just run into brick walls.  Kinda frustrated, but that's what this medium is for I hope.  Thank you for your time..

Tom

P.S.  I've tried several release and stable versions and also DragonFly 6.01 and PC-BSD 10.2. with the same result...
